ops.text: Artifacts from the hosted-serving spike behind the 2026-07-19 serving decision (note 703bed77; evidence journaled on task f32fee09). Attached: the Modal vLLM app as deployed (modal_app.py — CUDA-devel base, pinned Qwen3-8B rev b968826d, unfused LoRA rank 32, bf16, A10G scale-to-zero), the async scorer with byte-identical sentinel semantics (score_served.py), the analysis + latency scripts, the frame extractor, and the results (report.json summary; served_results.json raw per-row served P(NO_STEER) + latency for all 628 rows). frame.json (6.4MB) deliberately not attached — regenerable from the frozen eval frame via extract_frame.py. Headline: hosted bf16 AUC 0.92953 vs local 4-bit 0.93169; |vLLM−Tinker| median 0.0022; threshold substrate-specificity measured (9 vs 26 fires at the promoted cutoff). These sources seed the hosted-lane build (task 5e51c5fc).
